description: Firewall create gates on confirm then requires a label, then POSTs the label plus default policies. Both languages send only inbound_policy/outbound_policy under rules (Go no longer emits null inbound/outbound arrays).

cases.name: requires confirm before creating
cases.expect_error: This creates a Cloud Firewall. Set confirm=true to proceed.

cases.name: creates a firewall with default policies
rejects an invalid inbound_policy (proto FirewallPolicy enum)
cases.expect_error: inbound_policy must be one of: ACCEPT, DROP

cases.name: rejects an invalid outbound_policy (proto FirewallPolicy enum)
cases.expect_error: outbound_policy must be one of: ACCEPT, DROP
